# Tal Paperin

> Fractional CRO and B2B sales consultant. I rebuild revenue functions and fix broken sales, fast. 30-plus B2B companies rebuilt, $20M ARR managed. Work with me three ways: fractional CRO (me, personally), fully outsourced sales via KSW Solutions, or TheDealMentor.AI for founders who want to run the motion themselves.

## Key pages
- [Tal Paperin, Fractional CRO (home)](https://talpaperin.com/): services, what I fix, case studies, engagements and pricing, contact.
- [Hebrew site](https://talpaperin.com/he/): Hebrew version of the homepage.
- [Blog](https://talpaperin.com/blog/): field notes on B2B sales, fractional CRO leadership, go-to-market and fixing broken revenue.
- [Case studies](https://talpaperin.com/case-studies): real results across startups, IoT, manufacturing, medical, retail and SaaS, on four continents.
- [Contact](https://talpaperin.com/contact): email, phone, WhatsApp, a 15-minute booking link and a contact form.

## Services
- [Fractional CRO](https://talpaperin.com/services/fractional-cro): A fractional CRO who sits in the seat and owns your revenue number, strategy, team, pipeline and forecast, without a $250K full-time hire.
- [Outsourced Sales Teams](https://talpaperin.com/services/outsourced-sales): Outsource your entire sales function. Native-speaking SDRs and AEs, senior leadership and a VP, hired, trained and managed for you by KSW Solutions.
- [Go-To-Market Strategy](https://talpaperin.com/services/go-to-market-strategy): A go-to-market strategy you can actually execute, including SaaS GTM. ICP, positioning, channels, playbook and a real forecast, then I help you run it.
- [International Market Entry and Global Markets](https://talpaperin.com/services/market-entry): Break into new markets without the expensive mistakes. I have built and run sales, teams, subsidiaries and support across four continents, repeatedly and for multiple companies. Here is how I pick a market and build it.
- [Sales Team Building and Training](https://talpaperin.com/services/sales-team-building): Build your in-house sales team that actually closes. I hire, train and manage SDRs, AEs and BDs, and replace who can't.
- [Distributor and Channel Partner Recruitment](https://talpaperin.com/services/distributor-channel-recruitment): Open new territories through the right distributors and channel partners. I recruit, sign and manage them for the long term.
- [B2G and Public-Sector Sales](https://talpaperin.com/services/b2g-public-sector): Win complex government and public-sector deals. RFIs, RFQs and B2G projects across the globe, run by someone who has actually closed them.

## Guides
- [What a Fractional CRO Actually Costs](https://talpaperin.com/fractional-cro-cost): A straight answer on fractional CRO pricing: what it costs per month, how that compares to a $250K full-time CRO, what is included, and when each level is worth it.
- [Fractional CRO vs Outsourced Sales](https://talpaperin.com/fractional-cro-vs-outsourced-sales): Fractional CRO, fully outsourced sales, or a do-it-yourself system? A straight breakdown of which fits your stage, and how to choose.
- [Fractional CRO in Israel](https://talpaperin.com/fractional-cro-israel): A fractional CRO for Israeli B2B companies selling at home and abroad. Senior revenue leadership, in Hebrew or English, without a $250K full-time hire.
- [Fractional CRO vs Hiring a VP of Sales](https://talpaperin.com/fractional-cro-vs-vp-of-sales): Tired of $30K-a-month VP of Sales hires you fire in 90 days? A fractional CRO gives you proven revenue leadership with no hiring gamble, no severance, and no lock-in.
- [A Frum Business Consultant Who Gets the Heimishe World](https://talpaperin.com/frum-business-consultant): A frum, shomer Shabbos business consultant and fractional sales leader from Eretz Yisrael, who knows the heimishe, Yiddish-speaking business world and helps frum business owners grow.

## Hebrew (עברית)
- [Services in Hebrew](https://talpaperin.com/he/services/): Fractional CRO, outsourced sales, GTM, team building, distributors and market entry, in Hebrew.
- [International B2B sales guide (Hebrew)](https://talpaperin.com/he/challenges): the bold guide to selling B2B internationally from Israel.

## Blog posts
- [A Frum, Shomer Shabbos Fractional Sales Leader](https://talpaperin.com/blog/frum-fractional-sales-leader): A frum, shomer Shabbos fractional sales leader and business consultant who shares your values, respects your calendar, and takes real ownership of your revenue.
- [Frum Business Consultant in Boro Park](https://talpaperin.com/blog/frum-business-consultant-boro-park): A frum, shomer Shabbos business consultant and fractional sales leader for frum and heimishe business owners in Borough Park, Brooklyn. Real sales ownership, shared values, no Shabbos or Yom Tov calls.
- [Sales Help for Heimishe Business Owners](https://talpaperin.com/blog/sales-help-for-heimishe-business-owners): Sales and business help for heimishe business owners, from a frum operator who respects the kehilla, the calendar and the way our world really does business.
- [Building a B2B Sales Machine in Western Europe](https://talpaperin.com/blog/building-a-sales-machine-in-western-europe): How I build a sales machine in Western Europe: market research first, then a focused push on the UK and Eastern Europe, built and run hands-on, not handed over as a deck.
- [Sales for the Yiddish-Speaking Business World](https://talpaperin.com/blog/yiddish-speaking-business-world-sales): Sales leadership for the Yiddish-speaking, heimishe business world, from a frum operator who knows how it really buys and sells, and works in English with Yiddish-speaking owners.
